action.description:
Introduced by Senators L. Johnson, Larson, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Keyeski, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Madison, Hysell, Phelps, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Brown, Clancy, Cruz, DeSanto, Haywood, Hong, Joers, Johnson, Kirsch, Mayadev, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Palmeri, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stroud, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell, Taylor, McCarville and DeSmidt
